title: [MCP] Verify and fully implement MCP callable tools
description: MCP infrastructure exists (McpManager, McpFallback, ToolOrchestrator fallback) but tools are not exposed as API tool definitions. The LLM can search via mcp_tools builtin but cannot actually call MCP tools (providers like Anthropic reject tool names not declared in the tools list). Fix: include McpManager tools in list_tools() output so they're sent to the API each turn, or add a call_mcp_tool(name, args) proxy builtin. Need to verify end-to-end with a real MCP server.
